race.comment: FROM THE BLOCK (1) has gone too quickly for his own good in his last two when just edged out late but gets the blinkers on first time to hopefully settle him down. Gets the 2kg claimer on to aid the big weight and is at top fitness now. Ready. ANOTHERHOUSE (3) went super fresh but was just denied late by a much fitter horse here. Better for that and gets in lighter with the 2kg claimer engaged. Draws the A1 and is sure to be right there when they quicken. THE COSMIC ONE (4) didn't give his rivals a sniff fresh when leading pillar-to-post at Balaklava. Fitter and draws well again. Expect them to employ similar tactics and try and repeat the dose. SPEEDTAIL (10) has built nicely into this prep and should be hitting his straps fourth-up, though he's drawn awfully. Needs a smart steer from Milnes. GOLDEN GURU (11) has been extremely consistent this campaign and deserves consideration. 3kg claimer goes on to get her in light at the weights. Not dismissing.
